## Validation

- [ ] `./scripts/validate.sh`
- [ ] Claude Code plugin validation, if `claude` is installed
- [ ] Live AgentMail smoke test, if this changes runtime behavior

## Release Checklist

- [ ] Updated docs for user-visible behavior
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` when behavior, packaging, or compatibility changed
- [ ] Ran `python plugins/sync_vendor.py` after core Python changes
- [ ] Confirmed no `.agentmail/`, logs, caches, or local DB files are included
